resumeStream(uint256).details: Both payer and payee must agree to resume (or DAO can force)      For simplicity, payer can resume their own stream DEEP-C-3 FIX: Don't clear pausedAccrued on resume - it needs to be claimed first The pausedAccrued will be cleared when payee withdraws

setRate(uint256,uint256).details: Settles current accrued before changing rate

updatePayee(uint256,address).details: Useful if payee's wallet is compromised

cancelStream(uint256).notice: Cancel stream and return remaining funds to payer H-1 Fix: Add nonReentrant to prevent reentrancy via malicious tokens

claimable(uint256).notice: Calculate how much is currently claimable

emergencyWithdraw(uint256,address).notice: Emergency withdraw by DAO (for contract migration or disputes)

estimateEndTime(uint256).notice: Estimate when stream will run out of funds

getPayeeStreams(address).notice: Get all stream IDs where user is payee (employee)

getPayerStreams(address).notice: Get all stream IDs where user is payer (employer)

getTotalEarnings(address).notice: Get total earnings for a payee across all active streams

getTotalObligations(address).notice: Get total obligations for a payer (total rate per second across all active streams)

pauseStream(uint256).notice: Pause stream (payer or payee can pause)

topUp(uint256,uint256).notice: Add more funds to an existing stream

withdraw(uint256).notice: Employee withdraws earned funds H-1 Fix: Add nonReentrant to prevent reentrancy via malicious tokens
